title: rhexia fulva
intro: Rhexia fulva, also known as the swamp pink or king's cup, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Rhexia fulva include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
